query: CRT television static screen flicker old TV monitor
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / analog_degradation: CRT television static and old TV monitors

response.objective_caption: A black and white image showing a human hand in silhouette pressing against a rectangular surface filled with dense static pattern. The hand appears from the lower right with fingers spread, palm flat against the textured area. The static-filled rectangle has an irregular left edge that curves inward, while the right edge remains straight. The background is solid black.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily degraded analog-style image dominated by television static noise filling a rectangular panel with an irregular warped left edge. A silhouetted human hand presses against the static surface from the lower right, fingers splayed against the grainy texture. The entire image evokes malfunctioning broadcast equipment and VHS-era signal decay, with the dense black-and-white noise creating an abstract, almost unrecognizable composition that obscures whether the hand interacts with a screen, fabric, or other surface.
